sqls.name: Student_Major_Department
sqls.SQL: SELECT Student.Major, Department.DNO, Department.DName, Department.Division FROM Student JOIN Enrolled_in USING (StuID) JOIN Course ON Enrolled_in.CID = Course.CID JOIN Member_of ON Student.StuID = Member_of.StuID JOIN Department ON Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO

sqls.name: Student_Major_Minor
sqls.SQL: SELECT Student.Major, Minor_in.DNO, Department.DName FROM Student JOIN Minor_in ON Student.StuID = Minor_in.StuID JOIN Department ON Minor_in.DNO = Department.DNO

sqls.name: Student_Grade_Gradepoint
sqls.SQL: SELECT Student.Major, Enrolled_in.Grade, Gradeconversion.gradepoint, Student.Sex FROM Student JOIN Enrolled_in ON Student.StuID = Enrolled_in.StuID JOIN Gradeconversion ON Enrolled_in.Grade = Gradeconversion.lettergrade

sqls.name: Faculty_Stu_Member
sqls.SQL: SELECT Faculty.FacID, Student.StuID, Member_of.DNO, Department.DName FROM Faculty JOIN Member_of ON Faculty.FacID = Member_of.FacID JOIN Student ON Member_of.StuID = Student.StuID JOIN Department ON Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO
